puzzle.title: The Flame That Bared a Legacy
puzzle.intro: In the annals of resistance, there stands a figure whose very name became a warning unto the end of time. This person chose enmity over kinship, defiance over submission, and stood in opposition to a call of mercy. Listen carefully to the echoes of an ancient proclamation as we uncover the identity of this notorious soul.
clues: I was born into the same clan as the final messenger of Allah, yet I stood against them at every turn.
My name carried meaning—a name meaning 'father of flame,' a name that would foreshadow my eternal destiny.
I unleashed harm against the bearer of truth, and even my own household joined in this campaign of cruelty.
I used my wealth and influence to silence the call to Allah, believing that money could extinguish divine light.
Allah dedicated an entire chapter to me—a chapter so brief that it can be recited in seconds, yet its weight remains till the Day of Judgment.
My companion in the Hereafter walks behind me, bound by a rope of fiber around the neck, carrying the very thorns they used to spread.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: Abu Lahab
Abu Jahl
Waraqah ibn Nawfal
Umayyah ibn Khalaf
Uqbah ibn Abi Mu'ayt

trial.label: Defining Confrontation
options: Leading the opposition against the Prophet in Mecca
Migrating to Abyssinia to escape persecution
Building the Kaaba with Prophet Ibrahim
Accepting Islam on the deathbed
Forging the Treaty of Hudaybiyyah
trial.answer: Leading the opposition against the Prophet in Mecca

location.label: Key Element
options: A wife who carried thorns and firewood
A staff that transformed into a serpent
A ring bearing the seal of Solomon
A golden calf worshipped by the people
A spring that gushed forth water
location.answer: A wife who carried thorns and firewood

outcome.label: Final Reckoning
options: An entire surah revealed declaring total ruin
Became the leader of the Muslim community
Received forgiveness at the moment of death
Built a great mosque in Medina
Was resurrected among the righteous
outcome.answer: An entire surah revealed declaring total ruin

puzzle.arabic: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَمَا كَسَبَ
puzzle.verse: His wealth will not avail him or that which he gained. (111:2)
